title: GemPad - Rekt
relevance_summary: Reentrancy attack on lock contract allowing attackers to drain liquidity

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls collectFees() if it has previously called transfer() within the same transaction.

red_flags: Multiple protocols bleeding liquidity through the same flaw
Malicious tokens triggering callbacks during transfers
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls collectFees() if it has previously called transfer() within the same transaction.
summary: GemPad suffered a reentrancy attack where attackers exploited missing reentrancy protection on the withdrawal function, draining liquidity from multiple protocols. A guard could have prevented this by blocking transactions calling collectFees() after a transfer().
